case_title: MY VU ET AL VS. LINDA PONZI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS MY VU , TRO NIEKAMP AND DEFENDANT LINDA PONZI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
